description: Ironclad Common and Uncommon Cards - Attack and Skill

cards.name: Bash
cards.description: Deal 8(10) damage. Apply 2(3) Vulnerable.

cards.name: Strike
cards.description: Deal 6(9) damage.

cards.name: Defend
cards.description: Gain 5(8) Block.

cards.name: Anger
cards.description: Deal 6(8) damage. Add a copy of this card to your discard pile.

cards.name: Armaments
cards.description: Gain 5 Block. Upgrade a(ALL) card(s) in your hand for the rest of combat.

cards.name: Body Slam
cards.description: Deal damage equal to your current Block.

cards.name: Clash
cards.effect: Only if all hand cards are Attack
cards.description: Can only be played if every card in your hand is an Attack. Deal 14(18) damage.

cards.name: Cleave
cards.description: Deal 8(11) damage to ALL enemies.

cards.name: Clothesline
cards.description: Deal 12(14) damage. Apply 2(3) Weak.

cards.name: Flex
cards.effect: Gain 2(4) Strength, lose it at turn end
cards.description: Gain 2(4) Strength. At the end of your turn, lose 2(4) Strength.

cards.name: Havoc
cards.effect: Play top card and Exhaust it
cards.description: Play the top card of your draw pile and Exhaust it.

cards.name: Headbutt
cards.effect: Place card from discard on draw pile
cards.description: Deal 9(12) damage. Place a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.

cards.name: Heavy Blade
cards.description: Deal 14 damage. Strength affects Heavy Blade 3(5) times.

cards.name: Iron Wave
cards.description: Gain 5(7) Block. Deal 5(7) damage.

cards.name: Perfected Strike
cards.description: Deal 6 damage. Deals an additional 2(3) damage for ALL of your cards containing 'Strike'.

cards.name: Pommel Strike
cards.description: Deal 9(10) damage. Draw 1(2) card(s).

cards.name: Shrug it Off
cards.description: Gain 8(11) Block. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Sword Boomerang
cards.description: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 3(4) times.

cards.name: Thunderclap
cards.description: Deal 4(7) damage and apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.

cards.name: True Grit
cards.description: Gain 7(9) Block. Exhaust a random card from your hand.

cards.name: Twin Strike
cards.description: Deal 5(7) damage twice.

cards.name: Warcry
cards.description: Draw 1(2) card(s). Place a card from your hand on top of your draw pile. Exhaust.

cards.name: Wild Strike
cards.description: Deal 12(17) damage. Shuffle a Wound into your draw pile.

cards.name: Battle Trance
cards.description: Draw 3(4) cards. You cannot draw additional cards this turn.

cards.name: Blood for Blood
cards.description: Costs 1 less energy for each time you lose HP in combat. Deal 18(22) damage.
cards.note: Variable cost based on HP lost

cards.name: Bloodletting
cards.description: Lose 3 HP. Gain 2(3) Energy.

cards.name: Burning Pact
cards.description: Exhaust 1 card. Draw 2(3) cards.

cards.name: Carnage
cards.description: Ethereal. Deal 20(28) damage.

cards.name: Combust
cards.effect: End of turn: lose 1 HP, deal 5(7) to ALL
cards.description: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP and deal 5(7) damage to ALL enemies.

cards.name: Dark Embrace
cards.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, draw 1 card.

cards.name: Disarm
cards.description: Enemy loses 2(3) Strength. Exhaust.

cards.name: Dropkick
cards.description: Deal 5(8) damage. If the enemy is Vulnerable, gain 1 energy and draw 1 card.

cards.name: Dual Wield
cards.description: Create a(2) copy(s) of an Attack or Power card in your hand.

cards.name: Entrench
cards.description: Double your current Block.

cards.name: Evolve
cards.description: Whenever you draw a Status card, draw 1(2) card(s).

cards.name: Feel No Pain
cards.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, gain 3(4) Block.

cards.name: Fire Breathing
cards.effect: When draw Status/Curse, deal 6(10) to ALL
cards.description: Whenever you draw a Status or Curse card, deal 6(10) damage to all enemies.

cards.name: Flame Barrier
cards.description: Gain 12(16) Block. Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal 4(6) damage to the attacker.

cards.name: Ghostly Armor
cards.description: Ethereal. Gain 10(13) Block.

cards.name: Hemokinesis
cards.description: Lose 2 HP. Deal 15(20) damage.

cards.name: Infernal Blade
cards.description: Add a random Attack to your hand. It costs 0 this turn. Exhaust.

cards.name: Inflame
cards.description: Gain 2(3) Strength.

cards.name: Intimidate
cards.description: Apply 1(2) Weak to ALL enemies. Exhaust.

cards.name: Metallicize
cards.description: At the end of your turn, gain 3(4) Block.

cards.name: Power Through
cards.description: Add 2 Wounds to your hand. Gain 15(20) Block.

cards.name: Pummel
cards.description: Deal 2 damage 4(5) times. Exhaust.

cards.name: Rage
cards.description: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain 3(5) Block.

cards.name: Rampage
cards.description: Deal 8 damage. Increase this card's damage by 5(8) this combat.

cards.name: Reckless Charge
cards.description: Deal 7(10) damage. Shuffle a Dazed into your draw pile.

cards.name: Rupture
cards.effect: When lose HP from card: gain 1(2) Strength
cards.description: Whenever you lose HP from a card, gain 1(2) Strength.

cards.name: Searing Blow
cards.description: Deal 12(16) damage. Can be upgraded any number of times.

cards.name: Second Wind
cards.description: Exhaust all non-Attack cards in your hand and gain 5(7) Block for each card Exhausted.

cards.name: Seeing Red
cards.description: Gain 2 energy. Exhaust.

cards.name: Sentinel
cards.description: Gain 5(8) Block. If this card is Exhausted, gain 2(3) energy.

cards.name: Sever Soul
cards.description: Exhaust all non-Attack cards in your hand. Deal 16(22) damage.

cards.name: Shockwave
cards.effect: Apply 3(5) Weak and Vulnerable to ALL, Exhaust
cards.description: Apply 3(5) Weak and Vulnerable to ALL enemies. Exhaust.

cards.name: Spot Weakness
cards.effect: If enemy intends to attack: gain 3(4) Strength
cards.description: If the enemy intends to attack, gain 3(4) Strength.
